name: CONGENITAL INTESTINAL ATRESIA

demographics.Location: jejunum + ileum (70%), duodenum (25%), colon (5%); may involve multiple sites

dominant_finding: gasless lower abdomen: gut usually air-filled by 4 h after birth
distribution: jejunum + ileum (70%), duodenum (25%), colon (5%); may involve multiple sites
discriminating_features: "triple bubble" sign = intraluminal gas in stomach + duodenal bulb + proximal jejunum as
"bulbous bowel segment" sign with curvilinear termination = dilated loop of bowel just
gasless lower abdomen: gut usually air-filled by 4 h after birth
polyhydramnios (in 50% ← duodenal / proximal jejunal atresia; rarely in ileal / colonic
